case_title: SILBER-COHEN, DIANE VS JOE ANGELINI AS AN INDV. AND DBA ANGELINI INSR AGY

docket_entries.description: VIA-MAIL, DEFT'S REQUEST TO POSTPONE HEARING. ORDER SUBMITTED TO COMMISSIONER. $10.00 FEE PAID.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT DEFENDANT JOE ANGELINI AS AN INDV. AND DBA ANGELINI INSR AGY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY PLAINTIFF SILBER-COHEN, DIANE THE EVIDENCE SUBMITTED WAS NOT SUFFICIENT TO ESTABLISH A BREACH OF DUTY BY DEFENDANT ANGELINI. NOTE: JUDGMENT IS FOR DEFTENDANT TO PAY NOTHING TO PLAINTIFF SILBER-COHEN. (IJS DID ALLOW A JUDGMENT TO BE ENTERED FOR DEFENDANT EITHER FROM THE CALENDAR DISPO SCREEN OR USING FILING CODE JGDFT) NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT WAS MANUALLY CHANGED TO REFLECT CORRECT PARTIES ON JUDGMENT. (SEE SCANNED JUDGMENT.) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SIGNED SENT TO JOE ANGELINI.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-20-2007, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO SEP-04-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-04-2007 - JUDGMENT. CLERK-BETH WILBER, COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT (506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
NOTICE OF CONTINUANCE MAILED TO ALL PARTIES.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY SILBER-COHEN, DIANE AS TO DEFENDANT JOE ANGELINI AS AN INDV. AND DBA ANGELINI INSR AGY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-20-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-29-14 ORDERED DESTROYED
